CVE-2025-68920.title: C-Kermit (aka ckermit) through 10.0 Beta.12 (aka 416-beta12) befo ...
CVE-2025-68920.description: C-Kermit (aka ckermit) through 10.0 Beta.12 (aka 416-beta12) before 244644d allows a remote Kermit system to overwrite files on the local system, or retrieve arbitrary files from the local system.
